name: Devotion
descs:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed'. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

1 ally with the fastest Speed) Skills that inflict [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed': Coin Power +1, damage dealt +50%

Final Power +1 to all Skills that inflict [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed'.
